title: psydrax parviflorus subsp. parviflorus
intro: Psydrax parviflorus subsp. parviflorus, also known as the 'Small-flowered Psydrax', is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Psydrax parviflorus subsp. parviflorus include treating fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Psydrax parviflorus subsp. parviflorus is prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
